opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My lip started burning yesterday, and today it erupted into this cluster of agonizing, weeping blisters.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came up fast and is really painful — I want treatment and to know it isn't something worse.

symptom_narrative.onset: tingling/burning ~24h ago after stress and poor sleep, then blisters
symptom_narrative.character: cluster of small painful weeping blisters on the lip
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: tender lump under the jaw; no mouth ulcers, no fever, no rash/target lesions elsewhere
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get these cold sores now and then

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; recent work stress and poor sleep; used a shared lip balm

objective_data_offered.value: cluster of small blisters, some weeping, on the edge of the lower lip, visible on video
eyes are fine — no redness, pain or light sensitivity
